gist.headline: Daily Bulletin
gist.blurb: Just a quick automated sweep to keep the repository's front page fresh with the latest community highlights.
gist.summary: Automated daily update to the README file to reflect the latest news and recently added community apps.
gist.impact: Ensures visitors to the repository see the most up-to-date community highlights and platform news.
gist.visual_concept: Polly the bee acting as a librarian or newsie, updating a community board with fresh papers.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing a tiny newsboy cap, pinning a fresh piece of paper to a wooden bulletin board. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and pastel gradient background. Chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.
